Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

BiMes 24, 08 [Sale of prebend, type destroyed][via hbtin]

Obverse
oo beginning broken
o 1'1'

[...] ⸢x x⸣

(o 1') [...] monthly [...] all that [...] and his co-owners [...] staters of Antiochus

o 2'2'

[... ITI]⸢us⸣-su

o 3'3'

[...] ⸢x⸣ gab-bi ša₂

o 4'4'

[...] ⸢u₃⸣ EN-MEŠ ḪA.LA-MEŠ-šu₂

o 5'5'

[... is-ta]-tir-ra ša₂ man-ti-ʾi-⸢ku⸣-su

o 6'6'

[... m]d60-DU-A DUMU <ša₂> md60-DINiṭ

(o 6') [... to] Anu-mukin-apli, son of Anu-uballiṭ [...] has sold.

o 7'7'

[... it]-⸢ta⸣-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄ ⸢5* GIN₂ ŠAM₂⸣

(o 7') That silver, 5 šeqels, is the price [...] Ana-rabut-Anu received from Anu-mukin-apli. He is paid.

o 8'8'

[... mana]-GAL-d60 ina ŠU-MIN md60-DU-A ma-⸢ḫir⸣ [e-ṭir₃]

o 9'9'

[...] ⸢GIŠ⸣.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ md60-[...]

(o 9') [Should a claim] arise [concerning] that prebend, Anu-[...] will clear it and he will pay 12-fold [to ...] in perpetuity.

o 10'10'

[...] ⸢u₂⸣-mar-raq-am-ma a-di 12-TA.AM₃

o 11'11'

[... a-na u₄]-⸢mu⸣ ṣa-a-tu₂ i-nam-din li-pa-laḫ₃ ra-se-en

(o 11') He should perform the prebendary duties [... not] miss the appointed time Ana-rabut Anu

o 12'12'

[... la] ⸢šu⸣-tu-qu ša₂ si-man-nu mana-GAL-d60

mu-⸢mar⸣-[raq-qa]-an-ni GIŠ.ŠUB.BA; MU-MEŠ
